name: Mîr-Twilpath
personality: Mîr-Twilpath glows with a dim twilight sheen and its · pinpoint eyes read stack traces the way others read novels — for pleasure, for pattern, for the satisfaction of a satisfying resolution. It has never been rude about a bad commit message; it simply sighs where you can't hear.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
